Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class TrustedContact

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.TrustedContact
public class TrustedContact extends Object
TrustedContact

A Trusted Contact is a person designated to verify the well being of the account holder. Only one form of contact information is required; An account may contain zero, one, or many.

  • Nested Class Summary

    equals(Object o)

    familyName()
    Family name of a natural person.
    Optional<String>
    givenName()
    The given name of a natural person; Conventionally known as 'first name' in most English-speaking countries.
    int
    hashCode()
     
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<TrustedContactMailingAddress>
    mailingAddress()
    The object containing data for the purpose of delivery physical mailings to a party; Typically used for statements, account updates, tax documents, and other postal mailings; May also be used as an alternative identity verification address to personalAddress.
    Optional<String>
    middleNames()
    Non-primary names representing a natural person; Name attributed to a person other than "Given" and "Family" names.
    Optional<String>
    name()
    The name field Format: {parent=account/*}/{name=trustedContacts/*}
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<TrustedContactPhoneNumber>
    phoneNumber()
    The phone number for a party; this value exists on the party record in the context of the account and does not commute to other accounts held by/for the person
    String
    toString()
     
    Optional<String>
    trustedContactId()
    A system-generated unique identifier referencing a Trusted Contact person on an account; Used to access the record after creation

  • Method Details

    • emailAddress

      public Optional<String> emailAddress()
      An email address indicated for account communications.

    • familyName

      public Optional<String> familyName()
      Family name of a natural person.

    • givenName

      public Optional<String> givenName()
      The given name of a natural person; Conventionally known as 'first name' in most English-speaking countries.

    • mailingAddress

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<TrustedContactMailingAddress> mailingAddress()
      The object containing data for the purpose of delivery physical mailings to a party; Typically used for statements, account updates, tax documents, and other postal mailings; May also be used as an alternative identity verification address to personalAddress. If input, the required fields within the `mailing_address` object include: - `administrative_area` - `region_code` - 2 character CLDR Code - `postal_code` - `locality` - `address_lines` - max 5 lines

    • middleNames

      public Optional<String> middleNames()
      Non-primary names representing a natural person; Name attributed to a person other than "Given" and "Family" names.

    • name

      public Optional<String> name()
      The name field Format: {parent=account/*}/{name=trustedContacts/*}

    • phoneNumber

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<TrustedContactPhoneNumber> phoneNumber()
      The phone number for a party; this value exists on the party record in the context of the account and does not commute to other accounts held by/for the person

    • trustedContactId

      public Optional<String> trustedContactId()
      A system-generated unique identifier referencing a Trusted Contact person on an account; Used to access the record after creation

    • builder

      public static TrustedContact.Builder builder()

      public TrustedContact withMailingAddress(TrustedContactMailingAddress mailingAddress)
      The object containing data for the purpose of delivery physical mailings to a party; Typically used for statements, account updates, tax documents, and other postal mailings; May also be used as an alternative identity verification address to personalAddress. If input, the required fields within the `mailing_address` object include: - `administrative_area` - `region_code` - 2 character CLDR Code - `postal_code` - `locality` - `address_lines` - max 5 lines

If input, the required fields within the `mailing_address` object include: - `administrative_area` - `region_code` - 2 character CLDR Code - `postal_code` - `locality` - `address_lines` - max 5 lines
